1//===-- XCoreTargetMachine.h - Define TargetMachine for XCore ---*- C++ -*-===//

8//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10// This file declares the XCore specific subclass of TargetMachine.
11//
12//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
13
14#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_XCORE_XCORETARGETMACHINE_H
15#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_XCORE_XCORETARGETMACHINE_H
16
17#include "XCoreSubtarget.h"
18#include "llvm/Target/TargetMachine.h"
19
20namespace llvm {
21
22class XCoreTargetMachine : public LLVMTargetMachine {
23 std::unique_ptr<TargetLoweringObjectFile> TLOF;
24 XCoreSubtarget Subtarget;
25public:
26 XCoreTargetMachine(const Target &T, StringRef TT,
27 StringRef CPU, StringRef FS, const TargetOptions &Options,
28 Reloc::Model RM, CodeModel::Model CM,
29 CodeGenOpt::Level OL);
30 ~XCoreTargetMachine() override;
31
32 const XCoreSubtarget *getSubtargetImpl() const override { return &Subtarget; }
33
34 // Pass Pipeline Configuration
35 TargetPassConfig *createPassConfig(PassManagerBase &PM) override;
36
37 void addAnalysisPasses(PassManagerBase &PM) override;
38 TargetLoweringObjectFile *getObjFileLowering() const override {
39 return TLOF.get();
40 }
41};
42
43} // end namespace llvm
44
45#endif
